class.name: RectangleRoundedWire
class.description: [RectangleRoundedWire] builds a closed rounded-rectangle wire on a [CadPlane]. It preserves analytic circular corner arcs instead of approximating them with polylines.

method.name: build_rounded_rectangle
method.description: Builds a rounded rectangle with the given [param size] and corner [param radius]. When [param plane] is omitted, the profile is built on the XY plane. When [param centered] is [code]false[/code], the rectangle starts at the plane origin.
